subject: english
text:
Fill in the blanks with the correct phrasal verbs : (The meaning of the phrasal verb is given in brackets)
i. After the game, everyone was too tired to ________ (continue)
A) give up
B) break down
C) take up
D) carry on
ii. He ________ his job because of health problems.(left)
A) took off
B) broke down
C) gave up
D) brought up
iii. The firemen managed to ________ the fire before it spread. (extinguish)
A) put out b) take off  c) turn on d) set up
iv. He ________ his shoes before entering the temple. (removed)
A) took over b) took away
C) took off d) took in
v. She ________ her grandmother after school every day. (cares for)
A) looks up
B) looks after  c) looks into d) looks for
vi. They ________ on their journey early in the morning.(started)
A) set out b) put out  c) call off d) go on
vii. We should not ________ our old friends. ( forget)
A) bring up b) call off  c) give up d) look down on
viii. He ________ the offer because he got a better one. (refused)
A) turned off b) turned down  c) turned in d) turned up
ix. The teacher asked the students to ________ their homework on time. (give)
A) put up b) hand in  c) break in d) get up
x. I will ________ the matter and let you know.  (see)
A) look after b) look into  c) look on d) look out
xi. He ________ his father in appearance and behaviour.
A) takes off b) takes out  c) takes after d) takes in
xii. The match was ________ due to heavy rain.
A) called off b) put out c) taken up d) gone off
xiii. ________ my old friend at the reunion.
A) came across B) came over C) came up D) came down
xiv. I'm really ________ to our vacation next week.
A) looking forward B) looking up C) looking after D) looking at
xv. Can you ________ the lights when you leave the room?
A) turn on B) turn off C) turn up D) turn down
xvi. I need to ________ my English vocabulary.
A) look up B) look after C) look at D) look for
xvii. She ________ her keys on the table.
A) picked up B) picked out C) picked over D) picked at
xviii. The car ________ on the highway.
A) broke down B) broke up C) broke out D) broke in
xix. She uses a lot of ________ to cover her scars.
A) make up B) makeup on C) make up for D) making up
xx. The fire alarm ________ during the test.
A) set off
B) set on
C) set up
D) set out

and still unemployed.
